message:
test(harness): wide_string_ops harness-matrix subprocess coverage (bd-jtix)

Adds wide_string_ops_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix
which dispatches every fixture case through the
`harness conformance-matrix-case` subprocess (mirroring the search_ops
pattern). This is the same code path the CI conformance matrix uses,
so it catches packaging/dispatch regressions that the in-process
execute_fixture_case helper can't see. The existing in-process test
is preserved as the fast-path oracle.

All 16 fixture cases (15 strict + 1 hardened) pass via both paths
across wcslen/wcscpy/wcscmp/wcsncpy/wcscat/wcschr/wcsncmp/wcsrchr/wcsstr.

Verification (rch + isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR):
  cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --tests       clean
  cargo test  -p frankenlibc-harness --test wide_string_ops_conformance_test
                                                     14 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-harness          clean
  ubs <touched>                                       exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
